title: MCEF [Keksuccino's Fork]
description: Library mod for rendering a Chromium-based browser in Minecraft.
body:
# About MCEF is a library mod that makes it possible to render a fully controllable Chromium-based browser in Minecraft. Other mods can use this mod to implement simple browser views and other browser-based things, like video players, or even web-based menus. **Keep in mind this is a library mod! This mod will do NOTHING on its own and needs other mods that utilize its features to make it do something!** # For Devs To use MCEF in your projects, take a look at its [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Keksuccino/mcef/tree/1.21.11) for how to add it as dependency. # Credits, Copyright & Licensing Modifications to the original MCEF are made by Keksuccino. All credit for the original MCEF goes to ds58 and all the other contributors who made MCEF possible. Thank you for your hard work! MCEF is LGPL, as long as your project doesn't modify or include MCEF source code, you can choose a different license. Read the license in the LICENSE file of the GitHub repository for more information. This project is a fork of [CinemaMod/mcef](https://github.com/CinemaMod/mcef). # Server Needed? Looking to play Minecraft with friends but setting up a server is just too time-consuming?
No worries! Simply rent a pre-configured server and start playing _in a snap_. Just click the image below and use code **[keksuccino](https://bisecthosting.com/keksuccino)** to enjoy a **25% discount** on your first month! You can also click the code itself if your ad blocker hides the banner.
